criteria.name: DM from a whitelisted user triggers a `run_turn` invocation and a Discord reply within 30s in a mocked end-to-end test
criteria.evidence: tests/test_send_message_resident.py + tests/test_resident.py + tests/test_status_lifecycle.py exist and exercise the FakeDiscordTransport→run_turn→post_message path. Executor reports 85 passed; structural diff confirms the wiring.

criteria.name: DM from a non-whitelisted user produces no reply and writes a system_logs whitelist_rejected entry
criteria.evidence: tests/test_whitelist.py exists; agent_kit/transport/discord.py implements the silent rejection + system_logs write.

criteria.name: Every inbound Discord message persists with a unique discord_message_id BEFORE any external IO; duplicate insert rejected
criteria.evidence: tests/test_discord_ingestion_persist_first.py and tests/test_duplicate_inbound_dropped.py exist; agent_kit/transport/discord.py implements the persist-first transaction (commented at the voice/image branches).

criteria.name: Voice ingestion sequence (persist-first transaction; Storage+Groq run after; update_message fills fields)
criteria.evidence: tests/test_voice_pipeline.py + tests/test_discord_ingestion_persist_first.py + tests/test_discord_ingestion_ledger.py cover the sequence; transport implementation matches.

criteria.name: Image ingestion sequence (persist-first; images row only after upload; auto reference_key)
criteria.evidence: tests/test_image_attachment_pipeline.py + tests/test_discord_ingestion_persist_first.py exist; transport branch creates messages row first, then images row post-upload.

criteria.name: Store.update_message present in Protocol and both store impls; tests/test_update_message.py verifies partial updates
criteria.evidence: agent_kit/ports.py exposes update_message; SQLiteStore + SupabaseStore implement it; tests/test_update_message.py exists.

criteria.name: Store.create_message accepts synthesize_outbound_id flag; default preserves Sprint 1a, False used by resident
criteria.evidence: tests/test_create_message_synthesize_flag.py exists; agent_kit/tools/communication.py branches on transport to pass False in resident mode.

criteria.name: Unmodified tests/store_contract.py passes against both stores
criteria.evidence: tests/store_contract.py is preserved (SD-006 honored); tests/test_supabase_store.py and tests/test_sqlite_store.py both reference it. Live Supabase contract is env-gated and skipped without SUPABASE_TEST_DB_URL.

criteria.name: tests/store_contract_v1b.py covers all new methods + image CRUD + idempotency uniqueness + request_body round-trip
criteria.evidence: tests/store_contract_v1b.py present; sense check SC18 confirmed local coverage.

criteria.name: 5 messages in 8s coalesce into a single turn with 5 trigger ids
criteria.evidence: tests/test_coalescer.py present; resident.py MessageCoalescer implements 10s/30s/10-msg caps.

criteria.name: Mid-turn kill/restart marks prior turn abandoned and re-fires triggers under fresh turn
criteria.evidence: tests/test_resident_recovery.py present; Reconciler in agent_kit/ledger.py handles abandoned turns.

criteria.name: view_image bytes rendered as Anthropic vision content block on next model call
criteria.evidence: tests/test_loop_vision_blocks.py exists; agent_kit/loop.py vision detection in tool-result construction is the documented narrow extension.

criteria.name: Resident send_message: row committed with NULL discord_message_id inside audit txn; update_message fills it post-commit; ledger pending→confirmed
criteria.evidence: tests/test_send_message_resident.py present; agent_kit/tools/communication.py + agent_kit/tool_kit.py implement queued external callable run after commit.

criteria.name: Tool atomicity preserved (tests/test_tool_kit.py:27 unchanged)
criteria.evidence: tests/test_tool_kit.py untouched. agent_kit/tool_kit.py keeps the body inside store.transaction(); tests/test_tool_kit_external_queue.py adds the new ledger ordering coverage.

criteria.name: Status message lifecycle (initial post → edits → final ✅ Done. N tool calls.)
criteria.evidence: tests/test_status_lifecycle.py + tests/test_status_formatter.py exist; agent_kit/resident.py implements on_turn_start status and post-tool-call edits.

criteria.name: Status throttling: 20 calls in 2s ≤ ~4 edits
criteria.evidence: tests/test_status_lifecycle.py covers debouncing; resident.py applies 1s debounce.

criteria.name: Mid-turn message in same turn re-prompts and widens triggered_by_message_ids
criteria.evidence: tests/test_mid_turn_messages.py present; loop.py mid_turn_message_check fires at both checkpoints.

criteria.name: Explicit-send_message gating runs mid-turn check before any Discord post
criteria.evidence: agent_kit/loop.py gates explicit send_message tool call with mid_turn_message_check (verified by sense check SC5 + tests/test_run_turn_hooks.py).

criteria.name: Anthropic idempotency-key replay using stored request_body
criteria.evidence: tests/test_anthropic_replay.py present; agent_kit/ledger.py Reconciler reads request_body and replays via Model.complete_turn(idempotency_key=...).

criteria.name: External reconciliation: anthropic/discord/groq/supabase_storage paths handled per SD-017
criteria.evidence: tests/test_reconciler.py covers the four provider branches incl. SD-017 Storage URL re-fetch + orphan-on-expiry; agent_kit/ledger.py implements them.

criteria.name: Tool external-IO ordering verified by tests/test_tool_kit_external_queue.py
criteria.evidence: Test file exists; audit_wrap structure matches the spec.

criteria.name: Discord ingestion-side IO ledgered (tests/test_discord_ingestion_ledger.py)
criteria.evidence: Test file exists; transport records ingest:* keyed rows.

criteria.name: Persist-first ingestion test (tests/test_discord_ingestion_persist_first.py)
criteria.evidence: Test file exists and instruments the ordering.

criteria.name: Duplicate inbound rejection (tests/test_duplicate_inbound_dropped.py)
criteria.evidence: Test file present; relies on the unique discord_message_id constraint added in migration.

criteria.name: All Sprint 1a tests pass UNCHANGED
criteria.evidence: tests/test_envelope.py, tests/test_ledger.py, tests/test_run_turn.py, tests/test_cli.py, tests/test_tool_kit.py exist with no diff entries; sense checks SC5/SC7 confirm invocation behavior preserved.

criteria.name: No literal Supabase service-role JWT, Discord/Anthropic/Groq key in any committed file
criteria.evidence: git ls-files + grep finds the unique JWT signature `xFknK1AD9JF6JIcGTYYOyOLUQNNj_WMNGL08K9Xr2NY` (the secret portion of the leaked Supabase service-role token) STILL present in two tracked files: .megaplan/plans/sprint-1b-discord-resident/state.json (idea field) and .megaplan/plans/sprint-1b-discord-resident/execution_trace.jsonl. The leaked-prefix guard test would also fail because the same JWT prefix appears in tracked finalize.json/final.md/state.json/execution_trace.jsonl. Executor's redaction work covered plan_v3/plan_v4/gate.json/older sprint state files but missed the live state.json + execution_trace.jsonl that carry the user-supplied idea verbatim.

criteria.name: Existing Transport Protocol unchanged; PushTransport added separately
criteria.evidence: agent_kit/ports.py keeps Transport intact (receive/send/stream_event) and adds a separate PushTransport with start/stop/post_message/edit_message/download_attachment/fetch_recent_messages.

criteria.name: agent_kit/loop.py changes limited to the documented kwargs and detection blocks
criteria.evidence: Reading loop.py shows the new optional kwargs (triggered_by_message_ids, recovered_input_messages, on_turn_start, mid_turn_message_check, transport, blob, channel_id), idempotency_key threading, request_body persistence, mid-turn gating, and vision detection — no broader rewrites.

criteria.name: Each new module under ~400 lines
criteria.evidence: wc -l: agent_kit/store/supabase.py 399, agent_kit/resident.py 310, agent_kit/transport/discord.py 391.

criteria.name: Deferral note recorded for invocation-mode attachments + transcribe_voice + Discord URL expiry tradeoff
criteria.evidence: ideas/sprint_1c_attachments.md present and updated with the SD-017 orphan-on-expiry note.

criteria.name: Manual smoke against staging Discord + Supabase
criteria.evidence: U5 in user_actions explicitly requires human staging interaction. Surfaced via T23 and not attempted automatically.

issues: Tracked files .megaplan/plans/sprint-1b-discord-resident/state.json and .megaplan/plans/sprint-1b-discord-resident/execution_trace.jsonl still contain the full leaked Supabase service-role JWT (signature xFknK1AD9JF6JIcGTYYOyOLUQNNj_WMNGL08K9Xr2NY). The secret-guard must-criterion fails and tests/test_no_leaked_secrets.py would fail when run.

rework_items.issue: Leaked Supabase service-role JWT is still committed to tracked plan-state files. The unique signature `xFknK1AD9JF6JIcGTYYOyOLUQNNj_WMNGL08K9Xr2NY` and the Supabase JWT prefix `eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSI` appear in tracked files .megaplan/plans/sprint-1b-discord-resident/state.json (`idea` field), execution_trace.jsonl, finalize.json, and final.md.
rework_items.expected: No literal Supabase service-role JWT, Discord/Anthropic/Groq token in any tracked file. tests/test_no_leaked_secrets.py runs green. The user-supplied idea text in state.json/execution_trace.jsonl/final.md/finalize.json must have the JWT redacted (e.g., replaced with `<REDACTED_SERVICE_ROLE_JWT>`), and the secret guard's reference to the prefix should be expressed via a non-matching constant (e.g., concatenation or chr() build) so the guard itself does not trip its own check via the description.
rework_items.actual: git ls-files | xargs grep finds the full unique signature in two tracked files (state.json, execution_trace.jsonl) and the prefix in five tracked files (state.json, execution_trace.jsonl, final.md, finalize.json, finalize_snapshot.json indirectly via state). T2 was claimed done but redaction was incomplete.

rework_items.issue: Final verification claim that the JWT-prefix grep returns zero matches across tracked files is contradicted by the current repo state.
rework_items.expected: Run `git ls-files | xargs grep -l 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSI'` and get an empty result, with tests/test_no_leaked_secrets.py passing.
rework_items.actual: Five tracked files match the prefix; two also contain the unique JWT signature. The secret-guard test would fail.

summary: Implementation work for Sprint 1b is structurally solid: persist-first Discord ingestion, Supabase store + Storage blob, resident runner with coalescer/status/recovery, image tools, vision blocks, idempotency-key replay, SD-017 storage-orphan recovery, and the new test suite (store_contract_v1b, persist-first, duplicate-inbound, send_message resident, anthropic replay, etc.) all line up with the gate's settled decisions. Modules are within the 400-line target (399/310/391). However, the must-criterion that no literal Supabase service-role JWT appears in committed files is currently failing — the unique signature `xFknK1AD9JF6JIcGTYYOyOLUQNNj_WMNGL08K9Xr2NY` and the JWT prefix are still in tracked .megaplan/plans/sprint-1b-discord-resident/{state.json, execution_trace.jsonl, finalize.json, final.md} files, and tests/test_no_leaked_secrets.py would fail when run against the present repo. T2/T21 redaction work was incomplete. Needs one more pass to redact those state-file occurrences and ensure the guard self-test does not re-introduce the prefix via its own task description.

Confirmed. Storage blob implements put/get/exists with deterministic paths.

Confirmed. Vision-block detection scoped to tool_result construction site.

Confirmed. ideas/sprint_1c_attachments.md captures attachments/transcribe_voice/Discord-URL-expiry tradeoff.
